languages.text: "Вот уж сюрприз, капитан-интендант! Я получил приказ от полковника Батошски оказать помощь {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости. Тебя в том приказе упомянуто не было".
"What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."
languages.original_text: "Вот уж сюрприз, капитан-интендант! Я получил приказ от полковника Батошски оказать помощь {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости. Тебя в том приказе упомянуто не было".

traits.locale_text: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."
"What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."
"What a surprise, Vedka! I got orders from Batoshski to assist — I don't remember him telling you to do the same."
"What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."
"What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."

languages.text: 「びっくりした、ヴェドカ！バトシフスキーから、手伝うように命令されたの。あなたに同じように命令したってことは、覚えてない」
languages.original_text: "What a surprise, Vedka! I got orders from Batoshski to assist — I don't remember him telling you to do the same."

traits.locale_text: 「びっくりしたわ、ヴェドカ！バトシフスキーから、手伝うように命令されたの。あなたに同じように命令したってことは、覚えてないわ。」

languages.text: "Ne sürpriz ama Levazımcı Yüzbaşı! Albay Batoshski'den {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ne yardım etme emri aldım. Senden bahsetmedi."
languages.original_text: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."

traits.locale_text: "Ne sürpriz ama Levazımcı Yüzbaşı! Albay Batoshski'den {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ne yardım etme emri aldım. Senden bahsetmedi."

languages.text: «¡Qué sorpresa, capitana-intendente! El coronel Batoshski me ha ordenado que ayudara a mi{mf|lord|lady}. No la mencionó a usted».
languages.original_text: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."

traits.locale_text: «¡Qué sorpresa, capitana-intendente! El coronel Batoshski me ha ordenado que ayudara a mi{mf|lord|lady}. No la mencionó a usted».

languages.text: “真是意外啊，军需官上尉！我接到巴托什斯基上校的命令，让我来协助舰长大人。他可没提到你。”
languages.original_text: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."

traits.locale_text: “真是意外啊，军需官上尉！我接到巴托什斯基上校的命令，让我来协助舰长大人。他可没提到你。”

languages.text: « Quelle surprise, capitaine-quartier-maître ! Le colonel Batoshski m'a donné l'ordre d'épauler Sa Seigneurie. Il n'a jamais parlé de vous. »
languages.original_text: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."

traits.locale_text: « Quelle surprise, capitaine-quartier-maître ! Le colonel Batoshski m'a donné l'ordre d'épauler Sa Seigneurie. Il n'a jamais parlé de vous. »

languages.text: "Was für eine Überraschung, Captain-Quartiermeisterin! Ich habe Befehl von Colonel Batoshski, {mf|Seine Lordschaft|Ihre Ladyschaft} zu unterstützen. Euch hat er nicht erwähnt."
languages.original_text: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."

traits.locale_text: "Was für eine Überraschung, Captain-Quartiermeisterin! Ich habe Befehl von Colonel Batoshski, {mf|Seine Lordschaft|Ihre Ladyschaft} zu unterstützen. Euch hat er nicht erwähnt."
